summary:
Progeria is not universally caused by an autosomal recessive gene because it includes disorders like Hutchinson-Gilford progeria syndrome, which is autosomally dominant. Different types of progeria have varying genetic mechanisms, so attributing all cases to autosomal recessiveness is incorrect.

The provided information supports this conclusion through references indicating contrasting inheritance patterns among known progeroid syndromes.

---

---. Answer choice: B
